addToGroup.description: Add an existing user to a group

get.description: Retrieve details of an existing group

removeFromGroup.description: Remove a user from a group

user.description: Select the user you want to remove from the group

group.description: Select the group you want to update

userName.description: The new name of the user

path.description: The new path to the group, if it is not included, it defaults to a slash (/)

permissionsBoundary.description: The ARN of the managed policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the user

tags.description: A list of tags that you want to attach to the new user

pathPrefix.description: The path prefix for filtering the results

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

groupName.description: The new name of the group

includeUsers.description: Whether to include a list of users in the group

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Whether to accept the response even if SSL certificate validation is not possible

proxy.description: HTTP proxy to use. If authentication is required it can be defined as follow: http://username:password@myproxy:3128

timeout.description: Time in ms to wait for the server to send response headers (and start the response body) before aborting the request
